notes: Created solution doc, rules, debugging gotcha, testing pattern, and skill signals.
Recorded the plain codex command-resolution gotcha, updated architecture/solution docs, and logged test-strategy coverage for the shim and launch-path fix.

context: codex-hud windows pty pwsh file-not-found fix
notes: Recorded that node-pty does not resolve short pwsh names like PowerShell; Windows .ps1 Codex launches now expand pwsh through PATH/PATHEXT before PTY spawn.
Global install now writes managed shims to PowerShell 7 and Windows PowerShell all-host/current-host profiles and exposes codex, codex-hud, codex-raw, and codex-hud-doctor from any directory.

context: codex-hud protected cwd global state fix
notes: Global wrapper state now defaults to LOCALAPPDATA\codex-hud so starting codex from protected directories such as system32 no longer attempts to create cwd\.hud.

Global PowerShell shim now leaves plain codex as upstream Codex, removes stale codex functions from old installs, and exposes codex-hub as the primary HUD wrapper command with codex-hud as a compatibility alias.
PowerShell shim now passes CODEX_HUD_POWERSHELL_BIN from the current PowerShell process path so node-pty no longer depends on PATH to find pwsh during codex-hub launches.
Terminal HUD now reads Codex config metadata and shows model/reasoning/tier, trust, sandbox, MCP/plugin counts, event counts, HUD store, event files, and cwd even when hook events are missing.
